review_scope: AGENTS.md repo-specific Verilog / RTL governance calibration
evidence: AGENTS.md declares concrete HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW risk levels for contract.yaml, core docs, and example RTL changes.
AGENTS.md declares must-test paths for contract.yaml, schemas/review-checklist.yaml, and completion-claim docs.
AGENTS.md declares L1 -> L2 escalation triggers for compile/lint-only implementation claims, missing clock/reset/interface specs, CDC/protocol/vendor-specific expansion, and implicit timing defaults.
AGENTS.md declares forbidden repo-specific behaviors including silent critical precondition filling and verified implementation claims without explicit evidence scope.
claim_boundary: Reviewer verification covers repo-specific calibration of AGENTS.md only; it does not prove runtime enforcement, semantic correctness, or full governance adoption.
